summary: Independent re-review found no P0-P2 plan defects. The prior FastCGI override P1 is closed because app and db expose no ports, PHP-FPM listens only on the fixed miaomu_fpm_socket Unix socket with group 10001 and mode 0660, only app and jia-caddy may mount or hold the access group, and recovery uses an isolated socket volume. Caddy uses three read-only mounts plus supplemental group 10001, never maps HTTP input to PHP_VALUE or PHP_ADMIN_VALUE, and all server, Docker, database, Caddy, socket-permission, negative FastCGI, rollback, and performance evidence remains an explicit L4 gate.
